title: NYC Comptroller — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across NYC Office of the Comptroller object schemas. Reconciles fields common to the Checkbook NYC API (checkbooknyc.com/api — Spending, Contracts, Budget, Revenue, Payroll domains), the Office of the Comptroller NYC Open Data assets, and comptroller.nyc.gov (WordPress).

x-nyc-commons.note: Geography/identifier/address/money definitions are $ref'd from the canonical nyc-commons set; agency-specific definitions remain local.

Borough.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Borough); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Borough still resolve.

Money.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (money.json#/$defs/MoneyUSD); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Money still resolve.

FiscalYear.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (money.json#/$defs/FiscalYear); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/FiscalYear still resolve.

Coordinates.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Coordinates); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Coordinates still resolve.

Location.description: A physical location spine — free-form address plus borough and optional coordinates.

AgencyReference.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (party.json#/$defs/AgencyReference); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/AgencyReference still resolve.
